lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Quit bugging me then! I got me some fish to catch!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I fish here instead of you?

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Nuh uh dude. Less talk, more fishing!

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Dude! Why should I help you? You like, might beat me! I'm not giving away my secrets like that dude Grampa Jack does!

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Who's Grampa Jack [he says/she says/they say]! He won this competition four years in a row! He lives in the house just outside the gate.
